title: Man kills seven of his children, and an eighth child, in Louisiana mass shooting
description: The children, aged from one to 14 years old, were killed in a shooting that police are describing as a "domestic disturbance".

title: In Turkey, Middle Powers Ponder Diplomacy With a Rogue U.S.
description: The U.S. remains an essential player. The problem, one analyst said, is how to deal effectively with a power that is “indispensable, coercive and unpredictable at the same time.”
categories: us and israeli attack on iran (2026)

title: Roman Reigns Reacts to Harsh Anti-TKO Chants After WrestleMania
description: WWE star Roman Reigns reacted to loud fan chants against TKO during an interview after his WrestleMania 42 match.

title: Multiple injured after bus full of NYC high school students and chaperones crashes near Lake George
description: The crash unfolded when the bus veered off the road, struck several trees, an outbuilding, a boat, and a vehicle, near Lake Shore Drive and Diamond Point Road.

title: Mets’ Devin Williams logs first blown save of season in follow-up to brutal outing
description: After an ugly performance Wednesday against the Dodgers in a non-save situation, the right-hander got hit with his first blown save this season in Sunday’s ninth inning. Michael Conforto’s game-tying RBI double against Williams helped sink the Mets in their 2-1 loss to the Cubs in 10 innings.
